name: Holo v86
summary: An easy menu of real operating systems — each one verified and booted right in your browser, no install.

description.p: Holo v86 is a launcher for real operating systems running on the v86 x86-to-wasm JIT. Pick one and it boots in the tab — Linux, DOS, KolibriOS, and more.

Each OS is precompiled by the holo-v86 ingest pipeline: its disk is encoded as an ordered set of content-addressed κ-blocks, sealed into the substrate, and streamed lazily — every block re-derived before the guest sees a byte (Law L5). The engine and BIOSes are κ-anchored too.
